results.title: Rupee rises 5 paise against US dollar in early trade
results.description: The rupee appreciated 5 paise to 96.11 against the US dollar in early trade on Wednesday, supported by a weaker dollar and positive domestic equities. However, higher crude oil prices, foreign fund outflows and tensions in West Asia limited the currency's gains

results.title: Bhai Tera Star Hai | Song - Nach Le Lalariya
results.description: Watch the song 'Nach Le Lalariya' from Hindi movie 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' starring Raghav Juyal, Sanjay Kapoor, Niharika NM and Barkha Singh. 'Nach Le Lalariya' is sung by Jasmine Sandlas and Sudhir Yaduvanshi and music of the song is given by Amit Trivedi. Lyrics of 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' song 'Nach Le Lalariya' are written by Kumaar. 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' also stars Vikalp Mehta, Vivan Bhathena and Chandan Roy Sanyal in pivotal roles.
